claim_not_supported: This packet does not show that Qwen is more accurate or more discriminating than the deterministic rule engine on route choice.
safe_sentence: On the 13-packet XRPL amendment replay corpus, Qwen added no route-choice lift over the deterministic rule floor (0/13 disagreements), while the replay-default process reduced modeled review hours by 81.03% versus a deterministic alert that every validator reviews.
